dashboard_html = ''' Admin Dashboard | Zeal Computer & CCTV Solutions
Zeal CCTV Admin
Logout
  • Products
  • Messages
  • View Website

Manage Products

Image Product Name Price (LKR) Description Actions

Customer Messages

×

Add New Product

Use direct image links from Unsplash, Pexels, etc.

Enter image URL to preview

×

Success!

Operation completed successfully.

''' # Save the dashboard HTML file with open('/mnt/kimi/output/dashboard.html', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(dashboard_html) print("✅ dashboard.html created successfully!") print(f"File size: {len(dashboard_html)} characters")
